description: CBSE Class 12 theory paper — MCQ, very short, short, case-based, and long answer sections.
instructions:
1. All questions are compulsory.
2. Read each question carefully before answering.
3. Figures to the right indicate full marks.
4. Use of calculator is not permitted unless stated.

sections.section_instruction: Each question carries 1 mark. Select the correct option.
Answer in 40-60 words. Each question carries 2 marks.
Answer in 60-80 words. Each question carries 3 marks.

sections.section_title: Section D — Case Based / Source Based
sections.section_instruction: Read the passage and answer the sub-questions. Each question carries 4 marks.
Answer in detail with diagrams where necessary.
Answer with proper derivation / explanation. (8 marks)
